fields.name: case_id
fields.description: Deterministic case identifier from Stage135 candidate registry.

fields.name: source_stage
fields.description: Origin stage for the candidate record.

fields.name: source_recommendation
fields.description: Original recommendation emitted by the predecessor stage.

fields.name: decision
fields.description: Candidate disposition after Stage135 gate evaluation.

fields.name: gate_verified
fields.description: Whether the predecessor gate verified the source case.

fields.name: writer_review_required
fields.description: Whether a human writer review must happen before promotion.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Human-readable rationale preserved for later migration planning.
